en.text: , and put it also in writing
, made: Heb. caused a voice to pass
Who is there among you of all his people
be with him, and let him go up
And all they that were about
, beside all that was willingly offered
, of those which had been carried away
. Hadid: or, Harid, as it is in some copies
. Hodaviah: or, Judah called also Hodevah
And these were they which went up
: Addan: or, Addon seed: or, pedigree
among those that were reckoned by genealogy
. were they: Heb. they were polluted from the priesthood
unto them, that they should not eat
. Jeshua: also called, Joshua Zerubbabel: Gr. Zorobabel Shealtiel: Gr. Salathiel
was upon them because of the people
; as the duty: Heb. the matter of the day in his day
, and of all the set feasts
, and of every one that willingly offered
. the foundation: Heb. the temple of the LORD was not yet founded
, and all they that were come out
. Judah: or, Hodaviah,Chap.2.40 together: Heb. as one
And they sang together by course
; the children: Heb. the sons of the transportation
, as ye do; and we do sacrifice
unto them, Ye have nothing to do with us to build
. Bishlam: or, in peace companions: Heb. societies
. set up: or, finished joined: Chal. sewed together
. pay: Chal. give revenue: or, strength
; we have: Chal. we are salted with the salt of the palace
may be made in the book
. moved: Cald. made within: Chald. in the midst thereof
hath been made, and it is found
therein. I commanded: Chald. by me a decree is set made insurrection: Chald. lifted up itself
. by force: Chaldee, by arm and power
we unto them after this manner
. wherein: Chaldee, in the midst whereof
. rolls: Chaldee, books laid up: Chaldee, made to descend
: Achmetha: or, Ecbatana, or, in a coffer
. I make: Chaldee, by me a decree is made hindered: Chaldee, made to cease
. let him: Chaldee, let him be destroyed
, the children of the captivity: Chaldee, the sons of the transportation
. as it is: Chaldee, according to the writing
, and all such as had separated
themselves unto them from the filthiness
upon him. began: Heb. was the foundation of the going up
peace, and at such a time
. unto: or, to Ezra the priest, a perfect scribe of the law of the God of heaven, peace, etc
, which are minded of their own freewill
; of the king: Chaldee, from before the king
? Whatsoever: Chaldee, Whatsoever is of the decree
. to banishment: Chaldee, to rooting out
such a thing as this in the king's
was upon me, and I gathered together
: and with him were reckoned by genealogy
. the son: or, the youngest son
. Zabbud: or, Zaccur, as some read
; and there abode we in tents
. I told: Heb. I put words in their mouth
for us, and for our little ones
is upon all them for good
is against all them that forsake
for this: and he was intreated
. fine: Heb. yellow, or, shining brass precious: Heb. desirable
was upon us, and he delivered
, and of such as lay in wait
of every one: and all the weight
of those that had been carried away
: all this was a burnt offering
Now when these things were done
for themselves, and for their sons
unto me every one that trembled
of those that had been carried away
have we been in a great
hath been shewed from the LORD
. space: Heb. moment a nail: or, a pin: that is, a constant and sure abode
. to repair: Heb. to set up
. by: Heb. by the hand of from: Heb. from mouth to mouth
, and leave it for an inheritance
as this; hast punished: Heb. hast withheld beneath our iniquities
with us till thou hadst consumed
us, so that there should be no remnant
. wept: Heb. wept a great weeping
of them, according to the counsel
. to put: Heb. to bring forth
belongeth unto thee: we also will be with thee: be of good courage
of them that had been carried away
, that they should gather themselves together
And that whosoever would not come
of those that had been carried away
. have taken: Heb. have caused to dwell, or, have brought back
. we are many: or, we have greatly offended in this thing
, and let all them which have taken
from us. for this: or, till this matter be dispatched
, and all of them by their names
, Machnadebai: or, Mabnadebai, according to some copies
